description: Pump with full I/O complement and Mode parameter: analog speed feedback (PV), speed setpoint (SP), digital start command input (DI), digital status output (DO), and Mode-aware control. The '_M' suffix indicates configurable operating modes.
applicableTo: Pumps with full I/O and mode control (AI + AO + DI + DO + Mode)

attributes.name: TagName
attributes.description: ISA-5.1 instrument tag identifier (e.g., XV-250-001)

attributes.name: ShortName
attributes.description: Human-readable equipment name used in UNS topic path (e.g., Harvest Valve)

attributes.name: ProfileDefinition
attributes.description: URL to the SM Profile definition that this instance conforms to

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: Free-text description of the equipment instance

attributes.name: Area
attributes.description: ISA-95 area designation (e.g., Cell_Culture)

attributes.name: Unit
attributes.description: ISA-95 unit designation (e.g., SUB-250)

IO.description: Process I/O - analog input, analog output, digital input, digital output bound to field instruments via MQTT

attributes.name: Speed_Pv
attributes.description: Measured pump speed from field instrument

attributes.name: Speed_Sp
attributes.description: Pump speed setpoint sent to field instrument

attributes.name: Status
attributes.description: Start command confirmation from VFD or PLC (true = running)

attributes.name: Start_Command
attributes.description: Run/stop command output to pump (true = run)

Parameters.description: Configurable parameters for alarm setpoints, operating modes, and alarm enables

attributes.name: High_High_Sp
attributes.description: High-High alarm setpoint for Speed_Pv

attributes.name: High_Sp
attributes.description: High alarm setpoint for Speed_Pv

attributes.name: Low_Sp
attributes.description: Low alarm setpoint for Speed_Pv

attributes.name: Low_Low_Sp
attributes.description: Low-Low alarm setpoint for Speed_Pv

attributes.name: High_High_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable High-High limit alarm

attributes.name: High_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable High limit alarm

attributes.name: Low_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable Low limit alarm

attributes.name: Low_Low_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable Low-Low limit alarm

attributes.name: Out_Min
attributes.description: Minimum output clamp value

attributes.name: Out_Max
attributes.description: Maximum output clamp value

attributes.name: AI_Bad_Alarm_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable bad quality alarm on analog input (PV)

attributes.name: AO_Bad_Alarm_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable bad quality alarm on analog output (SP)

attributes.name: Mode
attributes.description: Operating mode (e.g., CAS, MAN, AUTO)

attributes.name: DI_Bad_Alarm_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable bad quality alarm on start command input

attributes.name: DO_Bad_Alarm_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable bad quality alarm on status output

attributes.name: Operator
attributes.description: Operator acknowledgment or manual override flag

attributes.name: Maintenance
attributes.description: Equipment is in maintenance mode

attributes.name: OOS
attributes.description: Equipment is out of service

attributes.name: Interlocked
attributes.description: Equipment is interlocked (prevented from operating)

attributes.name: ResetReq
attributes.description: Reset request flag (clear alarm or fault condition)

Alarms.description: Reference tags for Ignition alarm evaluation. Each tag's value mirrors an IO process variable that an Ignition alarm property evaluates against. Alarm active/inactive state is not published in this profile version.

attributes.name: High_High
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to Speed_Pv PV for Ignition alarm evaluation

attributes.name: High
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to Speed_Pv PV for Ignition alarm evaluation

attributes.name: Low
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to Speed_Pv PV for Ignition alarm evaluation

attributes.name: Low_Low
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to Speed_Pv PV for Ignition alarm evaluation

attributes.name: AI_Bad_Quality
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to Speed_Pv PV for Ignition bad quality alarm evaluation

attributes.name: AO_Bad_Quality
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to Speed_Sp for Ignition bad quality alarm evaluation

attributes.name: DI_Bad_Quality
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to Status for Ignition bad quality alarm evaluation

attributes.name: DO_Bad_Quality
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to Start_Command for Ignition bad quality alarm evaluation

attributes.name: ESTOP
attributes.description: Memory tag for Ignition ESTOP alarm evaluation
